## Goal
Provide a checklist that external reviewers can follow without guessing the expected validation steps.

## Suggested items
- [ ] smoke test
- [ ] manifest generation
- [ ] train v2 command
- [ ] train v3 command
- [ ] single-model evaluate command and metrics to compare
- [ ] ensemble evaluate command and metrics to compare
